subcodes.first_line: O thou over whom no one hath dominion! Render thanks unto God and be wholly detached before Him, inasmuch as He hath guided thee unto the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من لیس لاحد علیه سلطان فاشکر الله و تبتل الیه بما هداک الی نور الهدی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
